comments: We originally thought there was no show this week as in the first show of 1981 TV gives the tracks from the FNC of “two weeks ago”.
The date of this recording is confirmed by TV mentioning Joe Jackson being on ‘In Concert’ the following day.
In a slight change to the original broadcast, 'Ripples' was replaced by 'Say It's Alright Joe'

sessions.details: recorded 1980-05-07 at Lyceum, London. First TX 11 July 1980

track_listing.track: Genesis live at Lyceum, London 7th May 1980
